cover.title: Sayings you'll actually hear
cover.sub: Strange literal meanings, used in normal talk

cards.meaning: to turn a blind eye, let it slide

examples.nl: De docent zag de fout door de vingers.
examples.en: The teacher let the mistake slide.

cards.term: met de deur in huis vallen
cards.sub: to fall into the house with the door
cards.meaning: to get straight to the point

examples.nl: Ik val maar met de deur in huis.
examples.en: Let me get straight to the point.
We have to make the call.

cards.term: de puntjes op de i zetten
cards.sub: to put the dots on the i

examples.nl: Even de puntjes op de i zetten.
Neem een jas mee, het regent pijpenstelen.

cta.title: Save these and listen for one
cta.sub: Send it to whoever is learning Dutch with you.
